title: bromus rigidus var. ambigens
intro: Bromus rigidus var. ambigens, also known as rigid brome, is a variety of grass native to the western United States and parts of Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Bromus rigidus var. ambigens include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in salves and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
